description: You are an economist verifying whether a linear regression of food expenditure on income is correctly specified using the food expenditure dataset (food.gdt). Estimate a linear OLS model of food_exp on a constant and income, and perform Ramsey's RESET test using squared and cubed fitted values. Generate log transformations for both variables (l_food_exp and l_income) and estimate a log-linear OLS model. Save the estimation results for both models and the RESET test results—including coefficients, standard errors, R-squared, test statistics, and p-values—to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/reset_comparison.txt.
